mnemonics: S.E.C.U.R.E. AI: Systems Engineered Correctly Underpin Reliable & Ethical AI. (Each letter can represent a principle: Specifications, Engineering, Coding, User-focus, Reliability, Ethics)
keyPoints: Sound software engineering provides the foundation for reliability, security, and maintainability in AI systems.
Practices like version control, continuous integration, rigorous testing, and clear documentation are non-negotiable for trustworthy AI.
Human-centred AI requires that these engineering practices are applied with a focus on user needs, ethical considerations, and real-world impact.
commonMistakes: Focusing solely on model accuracy while neglecting software quality attributes like security, performance, and maintainability.
Treating AI development as a purely research-oriented task rather than a software engineering discipline with established best practices.
